best_qa_per_chain.question: Elizabeth of York marital status history
best_qa_per_chain.answer: The provided sources do not contain relevant information regarding Elizabeth of York's marital status history. Elizabeth of York was married to Henry VII of England, and they had several children together, which solidified the Tudor claim to the throne. She was the daughter of Edward IV and Elizabeth Woodville.

best_qa_per_chain.question: Elizabeth of York marriage details
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Elizabeth of York was married to King Henry VII of England on January 18, 1486. This marriage was significant as it united the warring houses of York and Lancaster, effectively ending the Wars of the Roses. Prior to this, there was a proposed marriage to Charles, the Dauphin of France, when she was just nine years old, but this did not materialize.

citations.title: Elizabeth of York - Wikipedia
Elizabeth of York - Simple English Wikipedia

best_qa_per_chain.question: Elizabeth of York marriage to Henry VII
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Elizabeth of York married Henry VII in 1486, uniting the rival houses of York and Lancaster. best_qa_per_chain.question: Nuneaton Conservative Party election results
best_qa_per_chain.answer: In the 2024 general election, Jodie Gosling of the Labour Party won the Nuneaton constituency, defeating the incumbent Conservative MP Marcus Jones. This marked a significant shift as Labour regained control after previously losing the seat to the Conservatives in 2010, which they held until 2024.

best_qa_per_chain.question: accessible bathroom design features wheelchair users
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Accessible bathroom design features for wheelchair users include wider doorways, grab bars, lower fixtures, and non-slip flooring. Additionally, roll-in showers and height-adjustable counters enhance usability and safety. These elements ensure independence and comfort for users with mobility challenges.

best_qa_per_chain.question: emergency pull cord regulations bathroom safety
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Emergency pull cords in bathrooms, especially for disabled individuals, are regulated to ensure they are easily reachable, properly maintained, and connected to a monitoring system. These cords must also be distinguishable from surrounding fixtures to enhance safety. They are crucial for providing immediate assistance in case of emergencies, such as falls.

best_qa_per_chain.question: emergency pull cord installation requirements accessible bathrooms
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Emergency pull cords in accessible bathrooms must be installed at a height that is reachable for individuals lying on the floor, ensuring they are not tied up or obstructed. The cords should be accessible and positioned at baseboard height to comply with ADA standards and HUD guidelines.

best_qa_per_chain.question: black and white cow breeds characteristics
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Black and white cow breeds exhibit a variety of characteristics. Notable breeds include the Holstein, known for high milk production and distinctive black and white markings, and the Belted Galloway, which has a unique 'belt' of white around its midsection. Other breeds like the British White Park and Blaarkop also feature similar color patterns but may differ in size and purpose.

citations.title: Black and white cow breeds | Countryfile.com
Discover 10 Black and White Cow Breeds - A-Z Animals
20 Black And White Cow Breeds (The Ultimate Guide)

best_qa_per_chain.question: cows with horns common breeds
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Common breeds of cows with horns include Highland cattle, Texas Longhorn, English Longhorn, Jersey, Holstein, and Kerry dairy cattle. These breeds are known for their distinctive horn characteristics, which can vary significantly in size and shape.

citations.title: Highland cattle - Wikipedia
What Breeds of Female Cows Have Horns? - Reference.com

best_qa_per_chain.question: Holstein cow characteristics and habitat
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Holstein cows are large black-and-white dairy cattle that originated in Europe, specifically in the region of Frisia, which includes parts of the Netherlands and Germany. They are known for their high milk production and are one of the most common cattle breeds worldwide. Holsteins thrive in various habitats but are primarily found in dairy farms across temperate regions.

citations.title: Holstein - Wikipedia
Holstein Friesian - Wikipedia

best_qa_per_chain.question: woodpile benefits for livestock
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Woodpiles, particularly in the context of silvopasture, provide significant benefits for livestock by offering shade that reduces heat stress, enhancing animal welfare. Additionally, they can extend the grazing season and provide nutritional benefits through lower trees and shrubs. Overall, integrating trees into livestock systems can improve both animal health and land quality.

citations.title: Silvopasture: What it is and how it benefits livestock farming
8 Benefits of Silvopasture - Grit
